auth.subtitle: The list of email domains allowed to sign up. This is the only list the server checks when an account is created.

confirm.body: Sign-ups will be allowed only from: {{list}}

dangerConfirm.body: The domain list is empty. After saving, NO new user can sign up until you add a domain again. To confirm, type the word DISABLE.
dangerConfirm.title: Block all sign-ups?

failClosed.banner: The domain list is empty — all new sign-ups are blocked.

saveFailed: Failed to save. Please try again.
title: Settings

validation.duplicate: This domain is already in the list.
